series_metadata.series_description: Per ORC 2909.14-.15, sheriff''s offices enter demographic information of convicted arsonists into the database statutorily maintained by the Bureau of Criminal Investigation & Identification (BCI). Demographic information includes, but is not limited to, the convicted arsonist''s name, address, personally identifying information, and conviction information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: or 7 years adequate proof of death
